metadata.title: Post a task | Slashie
metadata.description: Post a Slashie task with details, timing, budget, contact preference, and location.

en.title: Tell workers what you need
en.description: Add the details, timing, budget, and location so nearby workers can send useful quotes.
en.missingDetails: Some details are missing - check earlier steps.

metadata.title: 發佈任務 | Slashie
metadata.description: 在 Slashie 發佈任務，加入詳情、時間、預算、聯絡偏好和地點。

zh_hk.title: 告訴 workers 你需要甚麼
zh_hk.description: 加入詳情、時間、預算和地點，讓附近 workers 傳送有用報價。
zh_hk.missingDetails: 部分資料未完成，請檢查前面的步驟。
